chk_directory_material_import_jobs_count.name: chk_directory_material_import_jobs_counts_non_negative
chk_directory_material_import_jobs_count.value: "directory_material_import_jobs"."total_rows" >= 0 AND "directory_material_import_jobs"."parsed_rows" >= 0 AND "directory_material_import_jobs"."valid_rows" >= 0 AND "directory_material_import_jobs"."warning_rows" >= 0 AND "directory_material_import_jobs"."error_rows" >= 0 AND "directory_material_import_jobs"."duplicate_rows" >= 0 AND "directory_material_import_jobs"."conflict_rows" >= 0 AND "directory_material_import_jobs"."applied_rows" >= 0 AND "directory_material_import_jobs"."skipped_rows" >= 0

uq_directory_materials_workspace_code_ac.name: uq_directory_materials_workspace_code_active
uq_directory_materials_workspace_code_ac.where: "directory_materials"."code" IS NOT NULL AND "directory_materials"."deleted_at" IS NULL

uq_directory_materials_workspace_source_.name: uq_directory_materials_workspace_source_key_active
uq_directory_materials_workspace_source_.where: "directory_materials"."source_name" IS NOT NULL AND "directory_materials"."source_external_row_key" IS NOT NULL AND "directory_materials"."deleted_at" IS NULL

uq_directory_counterparties_workspace_in.name: uq_directory_counterparties_workspace_inn_active
uq_directory_counterparties_workspace_in.where: "directory_counterparties"."inn" IS NOT NULL AND "directory_counterparties"."deleted_at" IS NULL

uq_directory_suppliers_workspace_inn_act.name: uq_directory_suppliers_workspace_inn_active
uq_directory_suppliers_workspace_inn_act.where: "directory_suppliers"."inn" IS NOT NULL AND "directory_suppliers"."deleted_at" IS NULL

idx_projects_workspace_customer_counterp.name: idx_projects_workspace_customer_counterparty
idx_projects_workspace_customer_counterp.where: "projects"."customer_counterparty_id" IS NOT NULL AND "projects"."deleted_at" IS NULL

idx_global_purchases_workspace_project.name: idx_global_purchases_workspace_project
idx_global_purchases_workspace_project.where: "global_purchases"."project_id" IS NOT NULL AND "global_purchases"."deleted_at" IS NULL
